18200.name: A Dusty Antechamber
18200.description: The simple staircase above leads down into a wood-floored square room, unadorned but for a few chairs that look less "set out" than "left here", and a creepy looking full length mirror, tucked away into one corner. Dark smears stain the floor, leading the eye toward a loosely curtained doorway to the south.

18201.name: A Sinister Meeting Hall
18201.description: This large but low-ceilinged round chamber is decorated lavishly, if heavy- handedly. Deep maroon velvet curtains cover the entire wall, broken only by the doorways to the north and south and by baroque golden sconces placed regularly about the circumference. A large ring of ebony desk surface opens on one side to allow entry to the circular floor space it defines -- scuffed and stained. Chairs outside the ring face inward.

18202.name: Initiation Chamber of Arioch
18202.description: This chamber is decorated similarly to the meeting hall outside, but is lit only by a single oil-fueled flame utop a short golden pillar on a large round raised slate platform. To each side of the pillar is a high-backed chair, decoratively carven but unpadded. A golden railing rings the platform and you have no choice but to step up and through.

18304.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18304.description: Unbearable heat seems to radiate from nowhere and everywhere, though the stone walls are cool to the touch. Combined with the stench, the strange and unidentifiable noises, and the claustrophobically small corridors, this place is about as close to hell as one could imagine.

18305.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18305.description: In many places the brittle stone walls are scarred and scratched. A dull thud responds to any tentative taps, and small flecks of stone dust off from the impact. Surely this can't be too far underground, or the weight of the soil on top would crush the soft stone. However you can hear no bustling above you. The silence, broken only occasionally by strange crumblings or drippings, seems invasive.

18306.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18306.description: Broken chains are set deep into a wall here. They were clearly meant to hold something once, but they are now quite rusty and likely couldn't contain a small dog. Some more lengths of chain lie upon the floor, torn completely from the wall and resting with the shattered bits of rock which once held them in place.

18090.name: Entrance to Castle Damnation
18090.description: You step through a dingy tent flap and ... an impossible vista spreads before your eyes like a fever dream. An unending plain of dead smoldering hillside is marked by a single landmark: the standing remains of a fantastic stronghold. As if sliced by the blade of satan, a river of fire bisects the plain and the castle itself -- the stonework crumbles and entire interior chambers lie exposed on either side of a gaping chasm. This is where you shall compete.

18091.name: Far End of the Carnival
18091.description: The raucous of the carnival is eeriely absent once under this dark tent. The area is clean and vacant except for a trapdoor in the dirt floor and a wooden sign posted at its head. West will take you quickly back to the familiar noise of the Wolfnacht.

18092.name: Wolfnacht Carnival
18092.description: Your footsteps are barely heard about the din of the arenas. You keep a hand on your purse at all times as you push your way through a throng of seedy looking individuals. Though you can't imagine a whole lot of theft would go on in a crowd where everyone's armed to the teeth and pumped to fight. The carnival extends back west and southwest.

18093.name: Wolfnacht Carnival
18093.description: The Wolfnacht carnival growls and roars ceaselessly into the night like a crumbling pinnacle of stone. Peddlers shove pointless baubles in your face, glance at your purse and compliment your waistline. Chewed cud sticks to your sole and you look up: this mad carnival stretches around you in every direction.

18094.name: Carnival Bazaar
18094.description: Vermin scurry about the area, scavenging what didn't quite make it to the burning pile as ways to the west. Crude lean-tos and ratty tents pepper the area and serve as both vendors' homes and places of business. The big tops of the mighty arenas loom overhead to the north.

18095.name: Carnival Bazaar
18095.description: Attracted to the huge crowds of adventurers, vendors have taken up residence near the trash pile. Though initially unwelcomed and ousted by the management, policing the multitude of crafty peddlers became more trouble than it was worth. Where there is gold, there's a place to spend it.

18096.name: Wolfnacht Carnival
18096.description: An enormous canvas tent opens up to your north. Fresh warriors of all sizes check and double-check their fittings and weapon releases as the wounded lie stewn about the entrance. The bonfire of garbage burns ever-brightly to the south, and this mad carnival continues on to the east.

18097.name: Base of the Giant Bonfire
18097.description: Bent weapons, broken vials, used food containers, clumps of torn hair, battered armor and backpacks burn alike under the intense heat of the fire. The sheer amount of black smoke spewing forth is almost enough to block the light of the blaze. Northeast or northwest gets you way away from this filth.

18098.name: Wolfnacht Carnival
18098.description: The carnival opens up allowing for much foot traffic north of the entrance. Tremendous sheets of canvas enclosing an arena to your northeast are held aloft by stout poles. A cacophany of carnie noises and smells await you to the east.

18099.name: At the Carnival Entrance
18099.description: A haze of black smoke stings your eyes and assails your nostrils with an indescribable stench. An enormous pile of burning trash just to your east blazes day and night, illuminating the carnival and its inhabitants. Clods of dead earth crunch beneath your feet as you step further in.

18100.name: The Pedestal of the Duel
18100.description: You stand precipitously at the edge of a deep chasm, hundreds of yards across. A narrow column of stone rises from its depths, truncated to form a tall pedestal at the center of the pit. There is just enough room for two mighty duellers to settle their differences with finality. There is no safety in fleeing from battle here and to lose means permanent death.

18001.name: Arena Entrance
18001.description: The loud boasting of nervous warriors fills your ears as you stand before the arena, considering the battle ahead. The clang of armorers repairing dented equipment and the groans of the injured resound from within the gates, and you cannot help but wonder if you will soon be joining their unhappy ranks. Above all else is the almost palpable tension that precedes a battle; you finger your weapon anxiously and await the next match.

18300.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18300.description: Loose stones crumble under your feet, causing you to slide a bit with each step and making quite the ruckus. The stone walls are pitted in many places, as if this place hasn't seen maintenance since the day it was completed. You can hear dripping off in the distance, though it sounds too thick to be water.

18301.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18301.description: Congealed slime coats the walls and floors here, and drips from the ceiling onto your clothing. It is unimaginably foul. As you walk through the room, your boots somehow slip around and stick to the ground at the same time. You silently pray you don't lose your footing and crash to the ground to end up coated in this disgusting goo.

18302.name: In the Lair of Yglrogmou
18302.description: This must be some sort of feeding chamber. Bones, many of them broken, almost completely cover the stone floor. In some places they are piled up, but that is likely due to happenstance than tidiness. Worse still, a thin red film coats many of the surfaces in the room, the dried blood that the foul beast wasn't thirsty enough to drink.

18303.name: A Junction in the Hallways
18303.description: A shimmering portal lies in the center of the junction, faintly glowing purple. The strange grey stone of which this dungeon is made is unlike most you've come across, and feels oddly brittle. Strange echoes assail your ears from every direction, as do foul odors. The stagnant air has your hair on end, and this seems like a bad place to stay for any amount of time.
